PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>

PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>

SELECT ?president ?presidentLabel WHERE {
  ?president p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q628004 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?startDate) , 1 , 4) = "2000")
  .
  ?president rdfs:label ?presidentLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?presidentLabel) = 'en')
}
